notes: Simple combo into LK Tornado. Mainly used for chipping on block as this will leave you -5 on hit.
Low hit-confirm into DP; Sets up corpse hops mid-screen on half the cast.
Consistent starter into DP up close. Corpse hop shenanigans after this as well.
Strongest consistent starter into DP. Has a tendancy to whiff if not in close proxmity.
2nd Strongest grounded combo without EX but leaves you -4 on hit. Mainly used to close out rounds (and chip) while optimizing meter-gain.
2nd Strongest meter-less jump-in combo without EX. Does damage and stun that approaches a raw SA3 but still leaves you at -4 on hit.

route: J. HP -> Cl. 5MP -> HP Dragon Smash
notes: 3rd strongest meter-less jump-in combo without EX. Requires a good placed high-hit j. HP and a slight walk into Cl. 5MP in order to get the HP Dragon Smash to connect.
Twelve, Elena, Urien, and Dudley specific; Sean's highest grounded meter-less damage amongst his other combos.
Cl. 5HP is more consistent when combo-ing into HK Tornado than Cl. 5HK is. Still -4 on hit though so be warned.
Highest Stun that Sean can deal with a meter-less jump-in. This deals a lot of damage, almost enough to offset being negative on hit.

This is the maximum damage Sean can do on a croucher with a meter-less jump-in. It is absolutely worth doing this combo and getting punished for it when it deals damage equal to a SA3 and builds a LOT of meter.
